headline: Assessing Aon (AON) Valuation After Recent Share Price Rebound And NFP Acquisition Impact
summary: Aon (AON) is in focus after recent trading data showed the stock up 2.1% over the past day and 1.2% over the past week, compared with weaker performance over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Aon. Those short term gains sit against a weaker backdrop, with the share price down 6.4% year to date and the 1 year total shareholder return down 12.23%. Meanwhile, the 5 year total shareholder return of 34.44% points to slower momentum compared with longer term performance. If this shift...
